summary: Iteration 31: Bulk inactivation feature (Sin ventas) - ALL 10 TEST SCENARIOS PASSED. Backend preview endpoint working correctly. Frontend modal with scope/period selectors, preview functionality, and UI all working as expected. Execute button NOT clicked as instructed (destructive action).

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warning about span inside tr/tbody - cosmetic only, caused by development tooling injection, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: 1. Backend: GET /api/maintenance/inactivate-no-sales/preview returns correct counts for scope=ambos (2,238 cuentas, 0 contactos)
2. Backend: Preview with months=12 returns more candidates than all-time (verified >= all-time count)
3. Backend: Preview with scope=cuentas only returns cuentas data (contactos_candidates=0)
4. Backend: Preview with scope=contactos returns 0 contactos (all are linked - cuenta_partner_odoo_id NOT NULL)
5. Backend: Invalid scope parameter returns 400 error
7. Backend: Sample cuentas structure validated (id, nombre, vat, ciudad fields present)
8. Frontend: 'Sin ventas' button visible in Cuentas toolbar at /cuentas page (top-right, lg+ screens only)
9. Frontend: Clicking 'Sin ventas' opens modal with scope and period selectors
10. Frontend: Click 'Ver preview' loads candidate counts (2,238 cuentas, 0 contactos) and sample list
11. Frontend: Changing scope cleared preview results (re-enables preview)
12. Frontend: Execute button is red (bg-red-600) and shows total count 'Inactivar 2,238 registro(s)'
13. Frontend: Cancel button closes modal cleanly
critical_code_review_comments: maintenance.py: Well-structured router with proper SQL query construction and date filtering
InactivateNoSalesModal.jsx: Good UX with warning message before destructive action, proper data-testid attributes
CuentasToolbar.jsx: Sin ventas button properly hidden on mobile (hidden lg:flex)
Preview clearing on scope/period change is good behavior - prevents stale data display
seed_data_creation: None - used existing production data for preview testing only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk inactivation feature complete. Key endpoints: GET /api/maintenance/inactivate-no-sales/preview (tested), POST /api/maintenance/inactivate-no-sales (NOT tested - destructive). Frontend modal at /cuentas with 'Sin ventas' button in toolbar. Current state: 2,238 cuentas with 0 sales all-time are candidates, 0 contactos (all linked). Execute button was NOT clicked to protect production data.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All bulk inactivation preview features working as specified.
